bead.title: readiness: normalize legacy classifications and loose JSON fields
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Live `ddx work --watch` readiness checks still reject semantically usable readiness results and fail open instead of applying the intended readiness outcome. Observed failures:
- `ambiguous` should mean `operator_required`.
- `safely_refinable` should mean `needs_refine`; this was observed in Fizeau on 2026-05-15 as `readiness check unavailable: unknown classification "safely_refinable"`.
- `split` should mean `needs_split`; this was observed in DDx on 2026-05-15 as `readiness check unavailable: unknown classification "split": expected one of ready, needs_refine, needs_split, operator_required, system_unready` while evaluating `ddx-c191e91a`.
- `score` may arrive as a decimal such as `0.86`; older decoding failed with `json: cannot unmarshal number 0.86 into Go struct field .score of type int`.
- `waivers_applied` may arrive as a scalar string; on 2026-05-15 `ddx work --watch` logged `decode readiness classification result: json: cannot unmarshal string into Go struct field preClaimReadinessClassificationPromptResult.waivers_applied of type agent.preClaimReadinessWaiver` while evaluating `ddx-edd8085b`.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
`cli/internal/agent/readiness_classification.go:126-139` normalizes some legacy readiness classifications but does not cover `ambiguous`, `safely_refinable`, or `split`. `cli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_hook.go:60-72` decodes classification-shaped readiness output into strict Go field shapes; `Score` must be tolerant of any present non-null JSON value, and `WaiversApplied []preClaimReadinessWaiver` currently rejects scalar or flat-string legacy/model outputs before classification can be applied. `cli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_hook.go:584-601` feeds decoded classifications through `ClassifyReadinessWithMode`, so a shape mismatch becomes an unavailable-readiness warning instead of a usable result. `cli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_hook.go:720-747` has a legacy decoder path that rejects unknown classifications before readiness outcome handling can apply.

PROPOSED FIX
Normalize legacy classification `ambiguous` to `operator_required`, `safely_refinable` to `needs_refine`, and `split` to `needs_split` for classification-shaped readiness output. Keep canonical prompt guidance saying new prompts must emit only `ready`, `needs_refine`, `needs_split`, `operator_required`, or `system_unready`; document aliases only as tolerated legacy/model-output compatibility. Make readiness JSON decoding tolerant where the value is non-decisive metadata: `score` should accept integer, float, string, object, array, bool, or null without preserving numeric meaning, and `waivers_applied` should accept null, an array of waiver objects, a flat string array, or a scalar string without failing the readiness check. Update mirrored bead-lifecycle skill text and tests so the model-facing contract, decoder, and prompt coverage agree.

NON-SCOPE
Do not make `ambiguous`, `safely_refinable`, or `split` canonical classifications. Do not use numeric `score` for routing, power inference, ordering, or bead metadata. Do not persist extra readiness metadata. Do not make loose decoding apply to decisive fields such as `classification`, `readiness_checks`, or `difficulty.estimated_difficulty`. Do not change warn-only readiness policy, timeout behavior, routing power policy, or post-run triage classifications.
bead.acceptance:
1. Add `TestReadinessClassification_NormalizesAmbiguousLegacyToOperatorRequired` proving `ClassifyReadinessWithMode("ambiguous", nil, ...)` returns classification `operator_required` and intake outcome `operator_required`.
2. Add `TestReadinessClassification_NormalizesSafelyRefinableLegacyToNeedsRefine` proving `ClassifyReadinessWithMode("safely_refinable", nil, ...)` returns classification `needs_refine` and the expected warn/block behavior for the configured quality mode.
3. Add `TestReadinessClassification_NormalizesSplitLegacyToNeedsSplit` proving `ClassifyReadinessWithMode("split", nil, ...)` returns classification `needs_split` and the expected warn/block behavior for the configured quality mode.
4. Add `TestPreClaimReadiness_DecodesAmbiguousClassificationAsOperatorRequired` proving classification-shaped readiness JSON with `"classification":"ambiguous"` decodes without an unavailable-readiness error.
5. Add `TestPreClaimReadiness_DecodesSafelyRefinableClassificationAsNeedsRefine` proving classification-shaped readiness JSON with `"classification":"safely_refinable"` decodes as `needs_refine` without an unavailable-readiness error.
6. Add `TestPreClaimReadiness_DecodesSplitClassificationAsNeedsSplit` proving classification-shaped readiness JSON with `"classification":"split"` decodes as `needs_split` without an unavailable-readiness error.
7. Add `TestPreClaimReadiness_DecodesDecimalScoreAsMetadataOnly` proving classification-shaped readiness JSON with `"score":0.86` decodes without error and does not expose score as a routing or power input.
8. Add `TestPreClaimReadiness_DecodesScalarWaiversAppliedAsMetadataOnly` proving classification-shaped readiness JSON with `"waivers_applied":"none"` decodes without an unavailable-readiness error and still applies the classification result.
9. Add `TestPreClaimReadiness_DecodesFlatStringWaiversApplied` proving `"waivers_applied":["docs-only waiver"]` decodes without error.
10. Update bead-lifecycle skill text in `cli/internal/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md`, `cli/internal/registry/defaultplugin/library/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md`, `.agents/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md`, and `.claude/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle/SKILL.md` so `ambiguous` is documented only as a legacy alias for `operator_required`, `safely_refinable` remains documented only as a legacy alias for `needs_refine`, `split` is documented only as a legacy alias for `needs_split`, `score` is explicitly non-routing metadata, and `waivers_applied` is still requested as an array even though the decoder tolerates legacy scalar output.
11. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run 'Test(ReadinessClassification_Normalizes(AmbiguousLegacyToOperatorRequired|SafelyRefinableLegacyToNeedsRefine|SplitLegacyToNeedsSplit)|PreClaimReadiness_Decodes(AmbiguousClassificationAsOperatorRequired|SafelyRefinableClassificationAsNeedsRefine|SplitClassificationAsNeedsSplit|DecimalScoreAsMetadataOnly|ScalarWaiversAppliedAsMetadataOnly|FlatStringWaiversApplied))' -count=1` passes.
12. `ddx skills check cli/internal/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle cli/internal/registry/defaultplugin/library/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle .agents/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle .claude/skills/ddx/bead-lifecycle` passes.
13. `make skill-schema` passes.
14. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
